message:
Pre-lowercase allowed host patterns at config time

Optimize host validation by lowercasing patterns once at configuration
instead of allocating during every request match.

Changes to ServerConfig:
- with_allowed_hosts(): Pre-lowercase each pattern via to_ascii_lowercase()
- allow_host(): Pre-lowercase the pattern before storing
- Add doc comments noting case-insensitive matching behavior

Changes to host_matches_pattern():
- Remove to_ascii_lowercase() call on wildcard suffix (now redundant)
- Add comment documenting that patterns are pre-processed
- Change ends_with(suffix.as_str()) to ends_with(suffix) - cleaner

Performance impact:
- Before: O(n) allocation per request per wildcard pattern
- After: Zero allocations during request matching
- Cost: One-time lowercase conversion at startup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
